articles.title: Aether OS is a computer in a browser built for the AT Protocol
articles.description: Aether OS puts a full-fledged desktop in your browser that ties directly into the AT Protocol. That means it connects to your Bluesky account and other public records. It offers a pretty full suite of apps, 42 in total, covering text editing, task management, and social media. There's even a rudimentary tracker for making chiptunes, […]
articles.author: Terrence O’Brien

articles.title: Sotomayor’s Wabi Sabi is the funnest record of 2026
articles.description: Shout out to subscriber N_Gorski for today's pick. They popped into the comments on last week's recommendation to ask what I thought of the new Sotomayor record. Well, I hadn't actually heard it yet, but now I'm obsessed. The group consists of siblings Raul and Paulina Sotomayor from Mexico City. Wabi Sabi is their first […]
articles.author: Terrence O’Brien

articles.title: AI Czar David Sacks wants Trump to ‘get out’ of Iran
articles.description: David Sacks, the White House's AI and crypto czar, has warned that a continued war in Iran could be catastrophic. On the All In podcast, Sacks said that "we should try to find the off-ramp." He expressed concern that Iran could demolish oil and gas infrastructure across the Middle East, but more alarmingly, that it […]
articles.author: Terrence O’Brien

articles.title: AI companies want to harvest improv actors’ skills to train AI on human emotion
articles.description: If you've got strong creative instincts, the ability to authentically portray emotion, and are capable of staying true to a character's voice throughout a scene, there's a job listing calling for your experience. The catch: You won't be performing in a theater, a film studio, or an underground performance space. You'd be using your talents […]
articles.author: Hayden Field

articles.title: Samsung’s Galaxy Buds 4 Pro are the choice — if you have a Galaxy phone
articles.description: Samsung promised "more than a design refresh" for its new top-end Galaxy Buds - it added upgraded woofers for improved, dual-amped hi-fi sound, a new blade design, clearer call performance, and better noise cancellation. Ultimately, while the $249.99 Galaxy Buds 4 aren't a huge leap forward over the previous model, they keep what was good […]
articles.author: John.Higgins

articles.title: The fast rise and epic fall of Clubhouse
articles.description: In 2020 and 2021, the social media world seemed to be on the verge of complete change. A new app called TikTok was ascendant, bringing a whole new kind of vertical video to phones everywhere. And another app - not as popular, but growing fast, and already hugely influential among the tech set - looked […]
articles.author: David Pierce

articles.title: Live-service games are a mess
articles.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on the slow-motion disaster of live-service games, follow Andrew Webster. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Two years ago, I stood at the top […]
articles.author: Andrew Webster

articles.title: The $100,000 fee for H-1Bs is causing all sorts of problems
articles.description: Last fall, President Donald Trump's executive order raising the fee for H-1B visas to $100,000 - like many of his immigration policies - led to near-immediate chaos. Thousands of workers who had flown overseas to renew their visas ended up stranded abroad. Details about who would be affected only emerged after the fact. Six months […]
articles.author: Gaby Del Valle
